title: Library of Congress Civil Rights Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for civil rights primary-source sets and classroom materials.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: The Library of Congress civil rights source set gathers photographs, documents, oral histories, and teaching materials connected to civil rights movements.
Use this source for primary-source analysis, sourcing, corroboration, historical context, and discussion about citizenship and rights.
Library of Congress source sets include public-domain and rights-unknown primary sources. Use the item pages to confirm rights before mirroring individual documents.
